Different levels, all epic adventures

Find your match, from gentler days out to extreme physical challenge.
Read our definitive guide to levels

Level 1
EasyIdeal for new adventurers or those who enjoy a more relaxed pace
Level 2
Easy-ModeratePerfect for adventurers looking to gently step things up
Level 3
ModerateFor active people who want to explore more wild and adventurous places
Level 4
Moderate-ChallengingCreated for adventurers ready to take on a few longer, more demanding days
Level 5
ChallengingBuilt for those who want a big, rewarding physical challenge
Level 6
Challenging-ToughFor experienced adventurers ready for consistently hard days
Level 7
ToughThe ultimate test for highly experienced adventurers seeking maximum challenge
Want to know more?
Read our definitive guide to Levels

Book with confidence

The world can change quickly.
Plans sometimes do, too.

That's why we keep things flexible

Trip Swap Guarantee

Cancel or switch most trips up to 65 days before departure, absolutely free.

Your Safety Comes First

We'll arrange a refund or help find an alternative if a trip can't run.

Real People, Real Support

Our Friendly 5* Customer Experience team is always here to help.

Features

Guides

Packing & Prep

Community

  • Explore places you couldn't yourself

    All trips are led by certified expert guides, unlocking life experiences in places most never see.

  • Go with the outdoor specialists

    Choose from 250+ award-winning active outdoor adventures in wild places, whatever your mood.

  • Join a small like-minded group

    75% join our trips as solo travellers, with most in their 30s-50s. 95% give our group dynamic 5 stars.

  • Hassle-free from start to finish

    We've sorted the logistics, so you can just rock up and have a blast in the wild.

Our Purpose

To protect our world's wild places, one adventure at a time.

Book With Confidence

Find out how your booking with Much Better Adventures is protected through our ABTOT membership

Positive impact adventure travel

Responsible travel has always been at the core of what we do. Travelling with Much Better Adventures means not just better trips for you, it's better for local communities, better for wildlife and better for the planet.
